nasb.text: The kings of the earth took their stand, And the rulers were gathered together Against the Lord and against His Christ.’

esv.text: The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers were gathered together, against the Lord and against his Anointed’—

cnv.text: 地上的君王都起來， 首領聚在一起， 敵對主和他的受膏者。’

ccb.text: 世上的君王一同行动，官长聚集起来， 要抵挡主和祂所膏立的王。’

csbs.text: 地上的众君王都起来， 首领们也聚集在一起， 抵挡主和他的基督。’
